name: Redux Toolkit
what_it_does: Official opinionated Redux toolset that eliminates boilerplate via createSlice, createAsyncThunk, and RTK Query for data fetching and caching.
use_cases: Generating Redux store slices with createSlice for predictable global state in a React app
Scaffolding RTK Query API endpoints to replace manual fetch/loading/error state patterns
Writing async thunks with createAsyncThunk for side-effectful operations like API calls
Enabling Redux DevTools time-travel debugging in generated applications
Using configureStore to wire middleware, reducers, and devtools in a single call
not_for: Trivial single-component state that useState handles fine
Server-rendered apps where state does not need to be shared across a client tree
best_when: Building mid-to-large React applications where predictable global state, DevTools debugging, and co-located data fetching are required.
avoid_when: The app is small, local state suffices, or the team wants a lighter alternative like Zustand or Jotai.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Redux errors are runtime warnings in the console; type errors via TypeScript are the primary signal for agents.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Reducers are pure functions; same action on same state always produces same result.
known_agent_gotchas: Immer's draft proxies mean you must either mutate the draft OR return a new value — doing both throws at runtime.
createAsyncThunk automatically dispatches pending/fulfilled/rejected actions; agents must handle all three in extraReducers or state will be incomplete.
RTK Query cache keys are derived from endpoint name + argument; agents that pass objects as args must ensure stable serialization or queries will never cache-hit.
configureStore enables serializability checks by default — passing non-serializable values (Date, Map, class instances) to state triggers loud console warnings that agents may not surface.
TypeScript inference requires typed hooks (useAppDispatch/useAppSelector) to be generated per-project; generic hooks lose type safety and agents often omit this setup step.

security_score_components.security_notes: Client-side library; secrets must never be placed in Redux state as it is accessible via DevTools. Dependency chain includes Immer and Reselect.
